industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: PT Megapower Makmur Tbk
summary: PT Megapower Makmur Tbk operates as an independent power producing company in Indonesia. It generates and operates electricity from various energy sources, such as nuclear, coal, gas, fuel oil, diesel, hydro, solar, wind, marine, and geothermal, as well as provides power plant operation and maintenance services. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in North Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Megapower Makmur Tbk is a subsidiary of Bina Puri Power Sdn. Bhd.
